payload.description: Slice 1: auto-review hardening — review prepare bundle + structured verdict inlined + emit-time teeth (bare/incomplete/stale code-review approve) + configurable checklist

payload.reason: 2 rounds adversarial subagent review (code-verified all API signatures; B1/B2/M2 fixed); converged ready-to-implement
re-declare scope as exact file list (attest verify uses exact canonical-path membership, not prefix); include generated-doc source claude_code.py + design/plan docs
plan converged through 2 adversarial review rounds; scope re-declared as exact file list

failed_checks.command: PATH="$(pwd)/.venv/bin:$PATH" ruff check src tests scripts

payload.suggested_fix: Re-run the failed checks locally, fix the underlying issues, then re-run `super-harness verify`.

checklist.note: Slice-1 A+B+C+checklist fully implemented per design. A: `review prepare` assembles bundle (diff∩scope, out_of_scope, spec/plan paths, checklist, committed-HEAD digest) to gitignored .harness/pending-reviews/<change>/. B: verdict inlined into event payload (cli/review.py:228 extra={"verdict":...}; test_review_verdict_gate.py:1168-1170 asserts payload.verdict.bundle_digest). C: emit-time teeth on `approve --reviewer code-reviewer` only — bare (no --verdict-file), incomplete (uncovered checklist item), and stale (digest mismatch) all rejected with EXIT_VALIDATION (cli/review.py:152-202). Digest is committed-HEAD only (scope_match.committed_scope_digest hashes `git diff base...HEAD`, working tree NOT hashed) and FAILS CLOSED — git error raises GitScopeError → EXIT_VALIDATION (cli/review.py:189-196), NOT inheriting the baseline's advisory fail-open. `review skip` correctly left WITHOUT teeth (cli/review.py:267-285 only stamps skipped=True; no override/attest-gate). plan-reviewer correctly advisory: --verdict-file inlined when present, never required (cli/review.py:229-234, reject:254-259). Base branch is explicit/ configurable (load_base_branch reads policy.yaml review.base_branch, no re-hardcoded main).

Diff stays within the declared 22 files; out_of_scope == [] in the bundle. No slice-2 work pulled in: reducer.py / attest / transitions.py UNCHANGED (verified via name-only grep). No D logic (no prior_findings handling, no open-finding stream walker) and no E logic (no --override flag, no skip-attest-verify classification) in src — the only `prior_findings` reference is a docstring note in review_verdict.py:15 marked "slice-2 only; ignored here". The verification_runner refactor is a pure import swap (deleted local _covered_by_scope, imported from core.scope_match) leaving the baseline's fail-open git policy untouched, exactly as Task 2 specified. No over-build observed.

New modules are clean, single-responsibility, tolerant-loader pattern matching existing source_scope/reviewer_policy conventions. Tests exercise real behavior (real git repos via subprocess, real CliRunner, real event emission + reducer), not mocks. Full suite GREEN: 1447 passed in 23.31s. `ruff check src/ tests/` → "All checks passed!". `mypy src/` → "Success: no issues found in 96 source files". 27 dedicated new tests across the 6 new test files all pass.

Empty-scope inert digest: documented in scope_match.committed_scope_digest docstring + tested (test_scope_match.py:71 constant, test_review_bundle.py:86 empty-scope). Dirty-tree rejection: assemble_bundle + _validate both check working_tree_dirty → reject with commit hint (test_review_bundle.py:78, test_review_prepare.py dirty-tree case). Git-error fail-closed: GitScopeError raised + tested (test_scope_match.py test_git_error_fails_closed). Bare/ incomplete/stale all rejected by test_review_verdict_gate.py (bare, incomplete-checklist naming missing item, stale-digest). Missing-prepare is handled implicitly and correctly per design §4.C: the gate recomputes the digest from HEAD and compares (does NOT read the bundle file), so no-prepare → no valid digest → caught as stale. The solo-owner manual-digest-forge path is the explicitly-accepted honest ceiling (design §2), not a defect.
